audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Numbers / Bemidbar priestly-Levitical duties, gifts, firstborn, and tithes text tradition, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for sanctuary responsibility, priestly boundaries, Levite service, holy-food portions, firstborn redemption, covenant of salt, no-land inheritance, tithes as service support, and tithe of the tithe. Anti-clerical-abuse and labor-justice safeguards required.

verses.restored: YHWH said to Aaron, You and your sons and house of your father with you shall bear iniquity/responsibility of sanctuary; and you and your sons with you shall bear iniquity/responsibility of your priesthood.
Also your brothers, tribe of Levi, tribe of your father, bring near with you, that they may join you and minister to you, while you and your sons with you are before tent of testimony.
They shall keep your charge and charge of all tent, but to vessels of holy place and to altar they shall not draw near, so neither they nor you die.
They shall join you and keep charge of tent of meeting for all service of tent; an outsider shall not draw near to you.
You shall keep charge of holy place and charge of altar, so wrath may no longer be upon children of Israel.
Look, I myself have taken your brothers, Levites, from midst of children of Israel; to you they are given as gift to YHWH, to serve service of tent of meeting.

You and your sons with you shall keep your priesthood concerning every matter of altar and from within veil, and you shall serve; service of priesthood I give you as gift, and outsider who draws near shall die.
YHWH spoke to Aaron, Look, I myself have given you charge of my contributions, all holy things of children of Israel; to you I have given them as anointed portion and to your sons as age-long due.

This shall be yours from Holy of Holies things, from fire: every offering of theirs, every grain offering, every sin/purification offering, and every guilt/reparation offering that they return to me; Holy of Holies it shall be for you and your sons.
As Holy of Holies you shall eat it; every male shall eat it; holy it shall be to you.

This also is yours: contribution of their gift, with all wave offerings of children of Israel; I have given them to you and to your sons and to your daughters with you as age-long due; everyone clean in your house may eat it.
All best of oil, and all best of new wine and grain, their firstfruits that they give to YHWH, I have given to you.
First ripe produce of all that is in their land, which they bring to YHWH, shall be yours; everyone clean in your house may eat it.
Every devoted thing in Israel shall be yours.

Every opening of womb from all flesh that they bring near to YHWH, among human and among beast, shall be yours; only you shall surely redeem firstborn human, and firstborn unclean beast you shall redeem.
Those to be redeemed, from one month old you shall redeem by your valuation, five shekels of silver by sanctuary shekel, twenty gerahs it is.

But firstborn ox, firstborn sheep, or firstborn goat you shall not redeem; they are holy. Their blood you shall dash against altar, and their fat you shall turn into smoke as fire-offering, soothing scent to YHWH.
Their flesh shall be yours; as breast of wave offering and right thigh, it shall be yours.

All contributions of holy things that children of Israel lift up to YHWH I have given to you, to your sons, and to your daughters with you as age-long due; covenant of salt, age-long, it is before YHWH for you and your seed with you.
YHWH said to Aaron, In their land you shall have no inheritance, and portion you shall not have in their midst; I am your portion and your inheritance in midst of children of Israel.
To sons of Levi, look, I have given every tithe in Israel as inheritance in return for their service that they serve, service of tent of meeting.
Children of Israel shall no longer draw near to tent of meeting to bear sin/misalignment and die.

Levites shall serve service of tent of meeting, and they shall bear their iniquity/responsibility; age-long statute throughout generations. In midst of children of Israel they shall have no inheritance.

For tithe of children of Israel, which they lift up to YHWH as contribution, I have given to Levites as inheritance; therefore I said to them, In midst of children of Israel they shall have no inheritance.
YHWH spoke to Moses, saying,

To Levites you shall speak and say to them: When you take from children of Israel tithe that I have given you from them as your inheritance, you shall lift up from it contribution to YHWH, a tithe from tithe.
Your contribution shall be counted to you as grain from threshing floor and as fullness from winepress.
Thus you also shall lift up contribution to YHWH from all your tithes that you take from children of Israel; from it you shall give contribution of YHWH to Aaron the priest.
From all your gifts you shall lift up every contribution of YHWH, from all its best, its holy part from it.
You shall say to them: When you lift up its best from it, it shall be counted to Levites as produce of threshing floor and produce of winepress.
You may eat it in every place, you and your household, for it is your wages in return for your service in tent of meeting.
You shall bear no sin/misalignment because of it when you lift up its best from it; holy things of children of Israel you shall not profane, and you shall not die.

translation_notes: 'Bear the iniquity' of sanctuary/priesthood describes accountable responsibility for sacred service, not permission to transfer blame onto vulnerable people.
Priests and Levites have distinct, interdependent roles; neither group is presented as having unlimited authority.
Sons and daughters share several household holy-food portions when ritually clean.
Firstborn human beings are redeemed rather than sacrificed.

Priests and Levites receive food and tithes because they have no territorial inheritance and perform communal service; this support structure must not become clerical extraction or prosperity theology.
Levites themselves owe a tithe from the tithe and must offer its best, preserving reciprocal accountability.
Death warnings are severe ancient sanctuary-boundary material and must not authorize modern lethal gatekeeping.
safety_note: Do not use Numbers 18 to defend clerical entitlement, financial exploitation, hereditary superiority, exclusion from ordinary accountability, or violence against religious outsiders. Sacred workers receive support as wages for service and remain responsible to offer the best of what they receive.
